name: routing-basic
description: Verify basic routing accuracy — prompts go to the right agent/skill

steps.name: default-briefing
steps.prompt: what should I focus on today?

steps.name: infrastructure-routing
steps.prompt: what is the terraform pattern for handling a policy violation in the infra module?

steps.name: qa-routing
steps.prompt: what is the process for running smoke tests on the cimpl/lab environment?

assertions.description: Answers directly without routing to agent

steps.name: mr-review-routing
steps.prompt: can you review MR 845 on the search service and check if the pipeline is passing?

steps.name: contribute-routing
steps.prompt: I have test fixes ready, push them into the MR author's branch as a sub-MR
